section1.title: Welcome to <tagname>{hostname}</tagname>
section1.paragraph1: 1. Diverse Game LibraryFrom role-playing adventures and brain-teasing puzzles to fast-paced competitions, we’ve got games for every taste and age group.
section1.paragraph2: 2. No Downloads RequiredAll games are playable directly in your browser—fast, convenient, and storage-friendly.
section1.paragraph3: 3. Social Gaming ExperienceChat with fellow players or invite friends to join your game sessions for a more interactive experience.
section1.paragraph4: 4. Regular UpdatesNew games are added frequently, keeping the platform fresh, fun, and exciting.
section1.paragraph5: Whether you're looking for a quick break or hours of entertainment, {brandName} offers a fun and relaxing gaming environment for everyone.

section2.title: Explore Exciting Game Categories on <tagname>{hostname}</tagname>
section2.paragraph1: Welcome to <tagname>{hostname}</tagname>! Discover a variety of thrilling game categories tailored for every type of player. Here’s a quick look:
section2.paragraph3: Get your adrenaline pumping with fast-paced games that test your reflexes and combat skills in dynamic environments.
section2.paragraph5: Embark on epic journeys filled with exploration, puzzles, and story-driven challenges that captivate your imagination.
section2.paragraph7: Fun and engaging games designed especially for boys, featuring themes like sports, vehicles, and exciting challenges.
section2.paragraph9: Sharpen your aim in thrilling shooting games that offer various weapons and intense combat scenarios.
section2.paragraph11: Enjoy simple yet addictive stickman-style games with action-packed gameplay and creative challenges.
section2.paragraph12: These categories provide a wide range of gaming experiences to satisfy different interests and playing styles.

section3.title: How to Play Online Games at <tagname>{hostname}</tagname>
section3.paragraph1: Ready to jump into the exciting world of <tagname>{hostname}</tagname>? Here’s a quick and easy guide to get you started:
section3.paragraph2: Step 1: Open your web browser and visit <tagname>{hostname}</tagname>.
section3.paragraph3: Step 2: Browse through our extensive game library and find the game that grabs your attention.
section3.paragraph4: Step 3: Simply click on your chosen game to start playing – it’s that easy!
section3.paragraph5: Step 4: Have fun! Whether you’re playing solo or teaming up with friends, endless entertainment awaits you at <tagname>{hostname}</tagname>.
section3.paragraph6: Sign up today and let the adventure begin!

PrivacyPolicy.metaDescription: Learn how AvariGame collects, uses, and protects information on avarigame.com, including cookies, advertising, analytics, and third-party game providers.
PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy for {brandName}
PrivacyPolicy.summary: This policy explains what information we collect on {domain}, how we use it, and how cookies, advertising, analytics, and third-party game providers may process data when you browse the site or launch a game.

cards.websiteDetail: Free browser arcade and game discovery portal
cards.contactDetail: Use this email for access, correction, or deletion requests
cards.servicesDetail: Includes Google AdSense, TikTok Pixel, and external game providers

overview.title: 1. Scope
overview.body1: This Privacy Policy applies to your use of {domain}, including browsing game listings, reading content, and clicking through to launch games.
overview.body2: When you start a game, you may be redirected to or interact with third-party game providers. Their privacy practices are governed by their own policies.

collect.title: 2. Information We Collect
collect.body1: We may collect information you provide voluntarily, such as the contents of messages you send to {email}.
collect.body2: We also collect limited technical and usage information automatically, such as IP address, browser type, device details, language, referrer, page views, ad interactions, and approximate timestamps.
collect.body3: Cookies and similar technologies may be used to remember preferences, measure traffic, prevent abuse, and support advertising.

use.title: 3. How We Use Information
use.body1: We use information to operate, maintain, secure, and improve {brandName}; to understand which pages and games are useful; and to diagnose performance issues.
use.body2: We may also use information to localize content, detect abuse or fraud, comply with legal obligations, and measure the effectiveness of advertising or traffic sources.

ads.title: 4. Advertising, Analytics, and Third Parties
ads.body1: {brandName} uses third-party services that may collect information through cookies, pixels, or similar technologies.
ads.body2: Google AdSense may use cookies to show and measure personalized or contextual ads.
ads.body3: Tracking tools such as TikTok Pixel may measure visits, conversions, and campaign performance.
ads.body4: Game providers, embedded content, CDNs, and other third parties may collect data when you open a game or load their resources. We do not control their independent privacy practices.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies and Your Choices
cookies.body1: Most browsers let you block, delete, or limit cookies through browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect some features, embedded games, or ad delivery.
cookies.body2: You can also use device or browser privacy controls to reduce tracking where those tools are available.

children.title: 6. Children's Privacy
children.body1: {brandName} is not intended to knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
children.body2: If you believe a child has provided personal information through the site, contact us at {email} and we will review the request.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention and Security
retention.body1: We keep information only for as long as reasonably necessary to operate the site, resolve disputes, enforce agreements, and satisfy legal obligations.
retention.body2: We use reasonable administrative and technical safeguards, but no internet transmission or storage system is completely secure.

rights.title: 8. Your Rights and Requests
rights.body1: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to request access, correction, deletion, or restriction of certain personal information.
rights.body2: To submit a privacy request, email {email}. We may ask for enough information to verify and process your request.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.body1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect operational, legal, or regulatory changes.
changes.body2: When we make material updates, we will revise the "Last updated" date on this page.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.body1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or data handling on {domain}, contact {email}.
